overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character travels from a covered walkway under an overpass, across a busy intersection with holographic billboards, and into narrower urban backstreets with heavy cyberpunk aesthetic including graffiti, steam vents, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under concrete overpass with pawn shops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass along the sidewalk with yellow tactile paving

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead of ego toward the tunnel exit

entered.detail: large concrete overpass covering the walkway with exposed beams and pipes
storefront with green trim and metal security shutters
large industrial ventilation pipes running overhead along the ceiling
concrete wall covered in white and red graffiti tags
yellow textured safety strips on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered urban walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The pawn shop with green trim sits on the right while cars pass by on the left. Graffiti covers the right wall and industrial ventilation ducts run overhead, creating a sheltered, semi-enclosed atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and holographic billboards

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with bright neon lighting
crossing the street at the marked crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered tunnel and crossing the intersection toward the neon-lit district

notable_agents.action: futuristic purple car stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: street sign displaying speed limit 40 mounted on a pole
vertical traffic signal showing green walk indicator
large holographic advertisement with purple neon displaying a woman's face
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a wide urban intersection bathed in neon light. A large digital billboard glows purple on the right while the character crosses the striped crosswalk. The traffic light shows green as futuristic vehicles wait at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with overhead walkways and neon advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering buildings and overhead bridge structures

agents.ego_description: walking down the street while looking up at the architecture and neon signs, then continuing forward

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive white mohawk and red pants walking past ego

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings with illuminated underside
distinctive geometric building facade with orange panels and angular design
floating neon advertisement with blue and pink lighting
ground floor commercial spaces with large glass windows

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character walks along an open city street lined with parked cars and neon signs. The camera tilts up to reveal towering buildings connected by overhead walkways. A pedestrian with a striking white mohawk passes by on the left as steam rises from vents along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with graffiti-covered walls and urban decay

events.description: turns right into a narrower alleyway with heavy graffiti and trash accumulation

agents.ego_description: walking into the narrow alley passing by closed storefronts and debris

notable_agents.action: person in purple shirt leaning against the wall near trash piles

entered.detail: blue neon sign reading CYBERWARE above a clinic entrance
wall completely covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
accumulated debris and garbage bags along the alley wall
metal security shutters pulled down over storefronts
dimly lit passage continuing deeper into the urban block

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow back alley marked by urban decay. A blue neon sign for a cyberware clinic glows on the left while the right wall is covered in dense graffiti and trash piles. The space becomes more enclosed and darker, with metal shutters covering the closed shops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered industrial underpass into a vibrant neon intersection before descending into a gritty urban alleyway. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving past a green-trimmed pawn shop and graffiti-covered walls under heavy ventilation ducts. As the character emerges from this enclosure, the scene opens into a wide, brightly lit intersection where purple digital billboards glow and futuristic vehicles wait at a green traffic light. The camera then follows the character across the street and along an open thoroughfare, tilting upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and overhead walkways as steam rises from street vents. Finally, the environment shifts from the open city scale to a claustrophobic back alley, turning past a blue cyberware clinic sign toward dark, trash-strewn walls and closed metal shutters.
